allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''seedData.json''\)\); centab=[f for f in data if ''centab'' in str\(f\).lower\(\) or ''swaminathan'' in str\(f\).lower\(\)]; print\(json.dumps\(centab, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''seedData.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); centab=[f for f in data if ''centab'' in str\(f\).lower\(\) or ''swaminathan'' in str\(f\).lower\(\)]; print\(json.dumps\(centab, indent=2\)\)")
